name: Hydroponics Cycle Manager
info:
Purpose

Maintains the state of an active outside hydroponics control cycle.

The Cycle Manager groups multiple hardware events into a single logical
operation and determines whether the completed operation represents an:

• Auto Fill - Auto Dose cycle
• Manual Fill - Auto Dose cycle
• ESP-Override dose cycle

Responsibilities

• Creates a new cycle when the first device starts.
• Tracks whether water fill, Pump A, and Pump B participated.
• Captures the control mode at cycle start.
• Preserves a single pending cycle object throughout the operation.
• Generates capture requests for:
  - Before-cycle measurements
  - Fill completion
  - Dose A completion
  - Dose B completion
• Classifies the final event as FILL or DOSE.
• Provides the pending cycle to downstream logging and notification nodes.

Revision History

2026-07-06  GAL
• Updated controller operating mode terminology:
  - Auto Fill - Auto Dose
  - Manual Fill - Auto Dose
  - ESP-Override
• normalizeMode() updated to recognize the new Home Assistant
  control mode names while retaining backward compatibility
  with the legacy "Auto" and "Manual" values.
• Notification titles are now selected using both the controller
  operating mode and the completed event type (FILL or DOSE),
  allowing accurate user-facing notifications for each cycle.

2026-07-05  GAL
• Introduced unified pending cycle object.
• FILL cycles take precedence when water and dosing occur
  during the same operation.
• Captures HA control mode at cycle start instead of using
  hardcoded values.
• Added before/fill/dose capture flags for downstream
  processing.

2026-06-30  GAL
• Initial implementation.

Build Notification Text
info:
Purpose

Builds the user-facing completion notification summarizing a completed
hydroponics control cycle.

Supports:
• Auto Fill - Auto Dose
• Manual Fill - Auto Dose
• ESP-Override dose cycles

Displays only the information relevant to the completed cycle, including
water added, nutrient doses, tank volume, and TDS before/after values.

Revision History

2026-07-06  GAL
• Updated notification terminology to match the new controller
  operating modes:
  - Auto Fill - Auto Dose
  - Manual Fill - Auto Dose
  - ESP-Override
• Notification titles are now selected using both the controller
  operating mode and completed event type (FILL or DOSE).
• FILL notifications display:
  - Water Added
  - Starting Volume
  - Calculated Final Volume
• DOSE notifications continue to display:
  - System Volume

2026-07-05  GAL
• FILL notifications distinguish between:
  - Starting Volume (pre-fill tank volume)
  - Calculated Final Volume (Starting Volume + Water Added)
• DOSE notifications continue to report current System Volume.

2026-06-30  GAL
• Initial implementation.

name: Notify Cycle Complete
info:
Purpose

Sends the final user notification after a hydroponics control cycle
has completed.

The notification title is supplied by `msg.title`, and the notification
body is supplied by `msg.payload` from the Build Notification Text
function.

This node does not determine notification content; it only delivers it.

Revision History

2026-07-06  GAL
• Renamed node to "Notify Cycle Complete."
• Changed notification title from a hardcoded value to `msg.title`.
• Supports dynamic titles for Auto Fill - Auto Dose,
  Manual Fill - Auto Dose, and ESP-Override cycles.

2026-06-30  GAL
• Initial implementation.
